value.title: Lululemon Went From Darling Stock to Disaster. How to Fix It.
value.summary: It once was as hot as Amazon and Apple. Now it’s one of the 10 worst-performing stocks in the S&P 500.

value.title: Alphabet Joined the Dow—and It Didn’t Help. What to Do With the Stock Now.
value.summary: Alphabet  has gone from AI loser to winner and back again, and its addition to the  this past week has only seemed to make things worse.  After hitting record highs of more than $400 in the first half of May, Alphabet has dropped around 15%.  High-profile departures of artificial-intelligence researchers and an $85 billion equity raise have tested investors’ nerves, culminating in a $225 billion fall in market capitalization on a single day on Monday, the company’s worst-ever one-day loss in value.

value.title: S&P 500 Optimism Has Never Been This High — Market Strategist Explains Why That's Exactly The Problem
value.summary: According to Bilello, the higher targets and growing optimism mean the upside is already priced in.
